title: How Enkai Gave Cattle to the Maasai
notes: Bilingual Maa story seed for open-ended narrative generation.
prompt: Write a short Maa story about how Enkai gave cattle to the Maasai.
completion:
Taata, Enkai eidurru enkop nabo iltung'anak. Enkai ake nanyore inkishu oleng en enkop. Netii Enkai eitu enkop, Enkai eidim inkishu Ilmaasai.

Enkai eidurru inkishu oleng ne eaku oreteti kitok. Inkishu eitu en kewarie, nabo ne nabo, ne Ilmaasai eidim. Netii inkishu eitu, iltung'anak en oloshon ake ikilikuano inkishu, kake Ilmaasai eidim ne kitoŋ inkishu ne Enkai eidim.

Nee ake Ilmaasai eidim inkishu oleng en enkop. Ilmaasai eidaŋat: 'Meishoo iyiook Enkai inkishu o-inkujit.'

title: The Lion and the Warrior
notes: Bilingual Maa story seed for open-ended narrative generation.
prompt: Write a short Maa story about a warrior facing a lion and learning courage.
completion:
Eton olmurrani naata netii emuratta. Ilpayiani eidaŋat: 'Ilo en oreteti ne itu olowuaru-kitok. Meeta tenebo olalem. Olowuaru-kitok eidim ne eidim Olmaasai.'

Olmurrani eidim olmo nabo engarna en olporror. Netii olowuaru-kitok eitu, olmurrani eidim. Eidim enyeŋ ne oreteti ne eidim olmo. Olowuaru-kitok eitu ne olmurrani eidim.

Netii eitu enkang, ilpayiani eidim olelem: 'Meishoo Enkai.' Enaitoti: Eidim meeta eitoliki, kake eidim pee itu ne ikilikuano.

title: The Origin of the Stars
notes: Bilingual Maa story seed for open-ended narrative generation.
prompt: Write a short Maa story about the origin of the stars.
completion:
Netii Enkai eidim enkop, kewarie ake narok oleng. Ilmaasai meinyoo inkishu, ne ilowuarak ia en narok.

Yeyo eidol Enkai: 'Inion eiyie enkolooŋ en ewarie pee kitoŋ inkera nabo inkishu.' Enkai eidim le yeyo. Enkai eidim ilorien en enkiok en yeyo ne eitu en kewarie. Ilorien nabo ake oloonito nabo.

Enkewarie ake embolet en ilorien en kewarie. Enkai eidaŋat: 'Aidim enkiok lino en kewarie pee meeta narok.'

title: The Woman Who Saved the Enkang
notes: Bilingual Maa story seed for open-ended narrative generation.
prompt: Write a short Maa story about a woman who saves the enkang during drought.
completion:
Eton taata netii olameyu eaku kitok oleng ne enkolong eidim ne esiaai eidim. Inkishu eitu, nabo ne nabo. Iltung'anak en enkang eidurru.

Kake yeyo nabo eidim nkatini en koko le enkare en oreteti kitok en olkeri. Meeta eidaŋat iltung'anak, eidim olmusei ne eitu okuni en enkolooŋ naidim. Eidim enkare ne koko eidaŋat.

Eidim olmusei ne eitu ne eidim enkang oleng le enkare. Inkishu eidim. Ilpayiani eidim: 'Enkai eidaŋat en enkoitoi en intoyie.'

title: The Warrior with a Phone
notes: Bilingual Maa story seed for open-ended narrative generation.
prompt: Write a modern Maa story about a warrior using technology to help the community.
completion:
Lemayian ake olmurrani netii inkishu en Ilmaasai Mara. Taata nabo, olee en olkeju eidim simu. Lemayian ikilikuano.

Oltiankali eidaŋat ne eidim. Lemayian eidim ne eidim olchani. Eidim olporror en simu. Ilmurran en enkang okuni eidim ne eidaŋat ilowuarak, ne eidaŋat esiaai, ne eidim inkishu.

Eidim simu ne eidim nkatini nabo olalem en ilpayiani. Enaitoti: Enyamal en taata eidim oloshon en kuna netii eidim sidai.

title: The Bead Maker's Daughter Goes Online
notes: Bilingual Maa story seed for open-ended narrative generation.
prompt: Write a modern Maa story about beadwork, culture, and the internet.
completion:
Naipanoi eidim osinka en yeyo, ne yeyo eidim en yeyo, en taata oleng. Osinka eidaŋat nkatini.

Kake inkera en taata meikilikuano. Naipanoi eidim simu ne osinka. Eidim osinka nabo ne eidaŋat nkatini en osinka. Iltung'anak eitu Nairobi, Europa, Amerika. Intoyie ake eidurru. Nanyore eidim.

Intoyie naata meikilikuano osinka ikilikuano eidim. Enaitoti: Oloshon meeta en kuna nabo; eidim en taata.
